{{Infobox artifact
| name = Whispering Blade
| introduced = City of Light
}}

== City of Light ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|The [[Whispering Blade]] is a long dagger from [[Ragnarus]] that can cut through manifestations of [[Traveler]] powers.}}

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:City of Light]]
